meta.title: Review Practice Questions
meta.description: Speaking practice prompts with model answers for Cambridge B2/C1 review writing

entertainment.question: Tell me about a TV series you've been watching recently

answer.text: I've just finished watching The Last of Us on HBO, and I have to say it was definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: The first thing that impressed me was how faithful the adaptation was to the original video game.
answer.phrase: The first thing that impressed me was
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: What really stands out is the incredible chemistry between the two lead actors, which makes the post-apocalyptic journey genuinely moving.
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the production quality — every episode feels like a cinematic experience.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I wouldn't hesitate to recommend this series to anyone who enjoys dystopian drama with real emotional depth.
answer.label: Recommendation

entertainment.question: Describe a film that really stayed with you

answer.text: When it comes to memorable cinema, Everything Everywhere All at Once was definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: What really stands out is the unique blend of science fiction, comedy, and genuine emotional depth about family relationships.
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: The thing that is most likely to impress you is the wildly creative action sequences that somehow manage to be both absurd and heartfelt.
answer.phrase: The thing that is most likely to impress you is
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is Michelle Yeoh's incredible performance — she carries the entire film with such warmth and strength.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I would highly recommend seeing it, especially if you're looking for something completely original.
answer.label: Recommendation

entertainment.question: What's a video game you think more people should play?

answer.text: If you're looking for a truly relaxing gaming experience, I have to say Stardew Valley is definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: The first thing that impressed me was the sheer amount of freedom — you can farm, fish, mine, or just build relationships with the townspeople.
answer.phrase: The first thing that impressed me was
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: What really stands out is how the game never pressures you to play in any particular way.
answer.phrase: What really stands out is how
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the beautiful pixel art and charming soundtrack that create such a peaceful atmosphere.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I wouldn't hesitate to recommend it to anyone who needs a break from competitive or stressful games.
answer.label: Recommendation

entertainment.question: Tell me about a concert or live performance you really enjoyed

answer.text: When it comes to live music, seeing Taylor Swift on the Eras Tour was definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: What really stands out is the incredible production — the stage design, costume changes, and visuals are absolutely spectacular.
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: The thing that is most likely to impress you is that she performs for over three hours straight, covering every era of her career.
answer.phrase: The thing that is most likely to impress you is
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the sense of community — thousands of fans singing every word together creates an unforgettable atmosphere.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I would highly recommend experiencing it if you get the chance, even if you're not a massive fan.
answer.label: Recommendation

places.question: Describe a restaurant you'd recommend to visitors

answer.text: I recently ate at Dishoom in London, and I have to say it was definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: The first thing that impressed me was the authentic Bombay café atmosphere — the décor makes you feel like you've stepped back to 1960s India.
answer.phrase: The first thing that impressed me was
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: What really stands out is the quality of the food, especially their house black daal which has become legendary in London.
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is their breakfast menu — the bacon naan rolls are genuinely life-changing.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I wouldn't hesitate to recommend it to anyone visiting London who wants fantastic Indian food in a beautiful setting.
answer.label: Recommendation

places.question: Tell me about a café or coffee shop you like to visit

answer.text: When it comes to great coffee spots, Monmouth Coffee in Borough Market is definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: What really stands out is the quality of their coffee beans — they roast everything on-site and the aroma alone is incredible.
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: The thing that is most likely to impress you is how knowledgeable the baristas are about each origin and roasting method.
answer.phrase: The thing that is most likely to impress you is
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the atmosphere — it's always buzzing with market visitors and serious coffee enthusiasts.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I would highly recommend stopping by if you're serious about good coffee.
answer.label: Recommendation

places.question: Describe a museum or gallery you found interesting

answer.text: I recently visited the Natural History Museum in London, and I have to say it was definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: The first thing that impressed me was the building itself — the Victorian architecture is absolutely stunning.
answer.phrase: The first thing that impressed me was
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: What really stands out is the dinosaur gallery, especially the animatronic T-Rex that still manages to surprise visitors.
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is that admission is completely free, making it accessible to everyone.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I wouldn't hesitate to recommend it to families or anyone interested in natural history.
answer.label: Recommendation

places.question: Tell me about a park or outdoor space you enjoy

answer.text: When it comes to green spaces in London, Regent's Park is definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: What really stands out is the incredible rose garden — in summer, there are over twelve thousand roses in bloom.
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: The thing that is most likely to impress you is how peaceful it feels despite being in the heart of central London.
answer.phrase: The thing that is most likely to impress you is
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the boating lake and the Open Air Theatre, which runs throughout the summer.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I would highly recommend spending an afternoon there, especially if the weather's good.
answer.label: Recommendation

products.question: Tell me about an app you find really useful

answer.text: I've been using Duolingo for learning Spanish, and I have to say it's definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: The first thing that impressed me was how it turns language learning into a game with streaks, achievements, and daily goals.
answer.phrase: The first thing that impressed me was
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: What really stands out is the bite-sized lessons — you can genuinely learn something useful in just five minutes a day.
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is that the basic version is completely free, making language learning accessible to everyone.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I wouldn't hesitate to recommend it to anyone who wants to start learning a new language without feeling overwhelmed.
answer.label: Recommendation

products.question: Describe a book that taught you something important

answer.text: When it comes to self-improvement books, Atomic Habits by James Clear is definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: What really stands out is how practical the advice is — every chapter gives you actionable strategies you can apply immediately.
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: The thing that is most likely to impress you is the one percent improvement philosophy — tiny changes compound into remarkable results over time.
answer.phrase: The thing that is most likely to impress you is
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is how well-researched it is, combining psychology, neuroscience, and real-world examples.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I would highly recommend it to anyone struggling to build good habits or break bad ones.
answer.label: Recommendation

products.question: Tell me about a piece of technology you couldn't live without

answer.text: I recently got noise-cancelling headphones, and I have to say they're definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: The first thing that impressed me was the transformation of noisy environments — tube journeys and busy cafés become peaceful instantly.
answer.phrase: The first thing that impressed me was
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: What really stands out is the sound quality — you notice details in music you've never heard before.
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the battery life — a single charge lasts for days of regular use.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I wouldn't hesitate to recommend them to anyone who commutes or studies in noisy environments.
answer.label: Recommendation

products.question: Describe a guidebook or travel resource you found helpful

answer.text: When it comes to travel guides, Lonely Planet's Spain edition is definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: What really stands out is the depth of local knowledge — it includes hidden gems that most tourists never discover.
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: The thing that is most likely to impress you is the practical information about transport, accommodation, and local customs.
answer.phrase: The thing that is most likely to impress you is
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the offline maps feature in the app, which saved me countless times when I had no signal.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I would highly recommend it to anyone planning their first trip to Spain.
answer.label: Recommendation

experiences.question: Tell me about a sports activity or course you tried

answer.text: I did a week-long surf camp in Portugal last summer, and I have to say it was definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: The first thing that impressed me was the quality of instruction — the coaches were patient and really knew how to explain technique clearly.
answer.phrase: The first thing that impressed me was
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: What really stands out is the social atmosphere — you're learning alongside people from all over Europe, and everyone supports each other.
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the evening activities — beach bonfires, group dinners, and plenty of time to just relax.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I wouldn't hesitate to recommend it to anyone who wants to learn surfing in a supportive, fun environment.
answer.label: Recommendation

experiences.question: Describe a workshop or class you took part in

answer.text: When it comes to creative workshops, the photography course I took at my local college was definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: What really stands out is how much we learned about composition and lighting in just six weeks.
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: The thing that is most likely to impress you is the final project — we each created a portfolio showcasing our personal style.
answer.phrase: The thing that is most likely to impress you is
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the diversity of the group — students ranged from teenagers to retirees, all learning together.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I would highly recommend it to anyone interested in developing their creative skills.
answer.label: Recommendation

experiences.question: Tell me about a special event you attended

answer.text: I went to Comic-Con in London last year, and I have to say it was definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: The first thing that impressed me was the sheer scale of it — thousands of people all celebrating their favourite fandoms together.
answer.phrase: The first thing that impressed me was
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: What really stands out is the cosplay — seeing people's incredibly detailed costumes was genuinely inspiring.
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the panel discussions with actors and creators from your favourite shows and films.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I wouldn't hesitate to recommend it to anyone who's passionate about comics, gaming, or film culture.
answer.label: Recommendation

experiences.question: Describe a volunteering experience you had

answer.text: When it comes to meaningful experiences, volunteering at a local food bank was definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: What really stands out is how welcoming and organized the team was — they made sure volunteers felt valued and knew exactly what to do.
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: The thing that is most likely to impress you is the direct impact — you see immediately how your work helps families in the community.
answer.phrase: The thing that is most likely to impress you is
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is how the experience changed my perspective on food waste and community support.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I would highly recommend finding a cause you care about and getting involved, even for just a few hours a month.
answer.label: Recommendation

documentaries.question: Tell me about a documentary that really opened your eyes

answer.text: I recently watched Our Oceans on the BBC, and I have to say it was definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: The first thing that impressed me was the stunning underwater photography — some sequences took years to film.
answer.phrase: The first thing that impressed me was
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: What really stands out is how the cameras capture life in the darkest ocean zones, revealing creatures we rarely see.
answer.phrase: What really stands out is how
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the powerful environmental message about plastic pollution and climate change.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I wouldn't hesitate to recommend this documentary to anyone who enjoys nature programming.
answer.label: Recommendation

documentaries.question: Describe a documentary about history or culture you found fascinating

answer.text: When it comes to historical documentaries, The Last Dance about Michael Jordan was definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: What really stands out is the unprecedented access to behind-the-scenes footage from the Chicago Bulls' final championship season.
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: The thing that is most likely to impress you is how it reveals Jordan's competitive psychology — both inspiring and slightly terrifying.
answer.phrase: The thing that is most likely to impress you is
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is how it captures the cultural impact of the Bulls in the 1990s, far beyond just basketball.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I would highly recommend it, even if you're not particularly interested in sports.
answer.label: Recommendation

festivals.question: Tell me about a music festival or cultural event you attended

answer.text: I went to Glastonbury Festival last summer, and I have to say it was definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening phrase

answer.text: The first thing that impressed me was the sheer variety of music — over a hundred stages featuring everything from indie rock to electronic to world music.
answer.phrase: The first thing that impressed me was
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: What really stands out is the unique festival atmosphere — it's like a temporary city with its own culture and community.
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the non-music attractions — theatre, comedy, circus performances, and even a cinema.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I wouldn't hesitate to recommend it as a once-in-a-lifetime experience for any music lover.
answer.label: Recommendation

festivals.question: Describe a food festival or market you really enjoyed

answer.text: When it comes to food experiences, Borough Market in London is definitely worth considering.
answer.label: Opening

answer.text: What really stands out is the incredible diversity — you can find fresh produce, street food, and artisan products from all over the world.
answer.label: Feature 1

answer.text: The thing that is most likely to impress you is the quality of the food — from fresh oysters to artisan cheese to international street food stalls.
answer.phrase: The thing that is most likely to impress you is
answer.label: Feature detail

answer.text: Another feature worth mentioning is the atmosphere on Saturday mornings when it's at its busiest and most vibrant.
answer.label: Feature 2

answer.text: I would highly recommend spending a morning there if you're visiting London.
answer.label: Recommendation
